about.leadershipTitle: Leadership in Middle East and Balkan Studies
about.leadershipText1: IFIMES is a leading international institute dedicated to research and analysis of political, economic, and security issues in the Middle East and Balkan regions.
about.leadershipText2: Founded with a vision to bridge understanding and foster cooperation, our team of experts provides valuable insights and actionable recommendations to governments, international organizations, and private entities.
about.missionText: To provide independent, balanced and objective analysis of geopolitical, economic and security issues in the Middle East and Balkan regions to foster greater understanding and cooperation.
features: Established in 1995 with over 25 years of regional expertise
Special consultative status with the UN Economic and Social Council
Published over 500 analytical studies and research papers
Advised governments and international organizations on policy development
International team of researchers and subject matter experts

testimonials.label: Testimonials
testimonials.heading: What Our Partners Say
testimonials.subheading: Our research and analysis is trusted by leading international organizations and governments around the world

highlight.quote: IFIMES provides invaluable strategic insights that help shape our understanding of complex regional dynamics. Their analysis consistently demonstrates exceptional depth and foresight.

items.text: IFIMES consistently delivers exceptional analysis that helps inform our policy approaches to the Middle East region. Their insights have been invaluable for our strategic planning process.
The depth and quality of research produced by IFIMES has significantly enhanced our understanding of the complex dynamics in the Balkans. Their work stands out for its objectivity and thoroughness.
items.department: Department of Political and Peacebuilding Affairs

items.text: As a long-term partner of IFIMES, we've come to rely on their expertise for navigating the intricate political landscape of the regions they cover. Their analysis is both timely and forward-looking.
items.organization: Organization for Security and Co-operation in Europe

items.text: IFIMES has been instrumental in providing context and clarity on evolving situations in regions of strategic importance. Their analytical framework helps cut through complexity to identify key trends.

research.title: Researches
research.heading: At IFIMES, research drives our understanding of complex global dynamics
research.description: At IFIMES, research is at the core of our mission. Our team of analysts and scholars rigorously explores geopolitical, economic, and security developments across the Middle East, the Balkans, and beyond.

press.title: Press Releases
press.heading: IFIMES issues statement on diplomatic efforts in Middle East crisis
press.description: In response to ongoing tensions in the Middle East, IFIMES has issued a press release urging diplomatic dialogue and immediate de-escalation. The statement highlights the role of international institutions and think tanks in conflict prevention.

events.title: Events
events.heading: IFIMES to host international forum on EU enlargement policy formation
events.description: Scheduled for 20 May 2025 in Ljubljana, the forum will bring together leading scholars, policy makers, and diplomats to discuss the future of EU enlargement in the Western Balkans. IFIMES is honored to provide a platform for critical dialogue and exchange.

media.title: Media
media.heading: IFIMES featured in global media outlets for latest geopolitical analysis
media.description: Major international media have referenced IFIMES's latest geopolitical insights related to Eastern Europe and the Middle East. Our analysts continue to appear in interviews, shedding light on underreported yet critical developments shaping regional security.

aboutPage.title: About IFIMES
aboutPage.subtitle: International Institute for Middle East and Balkan Studies

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: IFIMES is dedicated to providing independent, balanced, and objective analysis of geopolitical, economic, and security issues in the Middle East and Balkan regions. Our mission is to foster greater understanding and cooperation through rigorous research and constructive dialogue.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.content: To be the leading international think tank bridging East and West, shaping policy discourse and promoting stability through evidence-based research and diplomatic engagement.

history.title: Our History
history.content: Founded in 1995 in Ljubljana, Slovenia, IFIMES has grown from a regional research center to an internationally recognized institute with consultative status at the United Nations. Over three decades, we have published hundreds of studies, organized numerous international conferences, and advised governments and international organizations on critical policy matters.

timeline.2004: Granted Special Consultative Status with UN ECOSOC
timeline.2010: Expanded research focus to include Euro-Atlantic relations
timeline.2020: Enhanced digital presence and global outreach

leadership.title: Leadership & Board
leadership.content: IFIMES is led by a team of distinguished scholars, diplomats, and policy experts with decades of experience in international affairs.

accreditations.title: Accreditations
accreditations.content: IFIMES holds consultative status with major international organizations, reflecting our commitment to excellence and our recognized contribution to international discourse.

partners.title: Our Partners
partners.content: We collaborate with leading think tanks, universities, and international organizations worldwide to advance research and promote dialogue on critical global issues.

getInvolved.title: Get Involved
getInvolved.subtitle: Join us in advancing international understanding and cooperation
getInvolved.opportunitiesSubtitle: Discover how you can contribute to our mission of fostering global understanding and regional stability

partnership.title: Partner With Us
partnership.description: Collaborate with IFIMES on research projects, conferences, and policy initiatives. We welcome partnerships with academic institutions, think tanks, and international organizations.
partnership.benefit1: Joint research publications and policy briefs
partnership.benefit3: Access to our global network of experts

research.title: Research Collaboration
research.description: Contribute to our research initiatives as an expert, consultant, or visiting scholar. Share your expertise on Middle East and Balkan affairs.
research.benefit2: Access to research resources and archives

careers.title: Career Opportunities
careers.description: Join our team of dedicated researchers and analysts working on critical international issues.

internship.title: Internship Program
internship.description: Gain hands-on experience in international affairs research. Our internship program is designed for students and young professionals.

whyPartner.title: Why Partner With IFIMES?
whyPartner.content: For over 30 years, IFIMES has been at the forefront of research and analysis on the Middle East and Balkans. Our partnerships have contributed to meaningful policy discussions and promoted regional stability.

cta.title: Ready to Make an Impact?
cta.description: Join our network of partners, researchers, and advocates working towards a more stable and interconnected world.
